revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Weekday in month]]": [[WP:SEMIPROT|semi-protection]] of high-usage templates to combat systematic vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if:{{#iferror:{{#time:|{{{1|}}}}}||{{#ifeq:{{#expr:{{{1}}}<0}}|1||X}}}}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{4|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{3|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{3}}}}}|{{{3|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{2|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{1|}}}}}
   }}
  |{{weekday in month/calc
     |n= {{weekday in month/ordinal|{{{1|1}}}}}
     |w= {{#iferror:{{#expr:{{{2|0}}}}}|{{#time: w|{{{2}}}}}|{{{2|0}}}}}
     |m= {{#time: M|2000-{{{3|}}}}} {{#time: Y|{{{4|}}}}}
   }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}
